7 // -*- C++ -*-
8 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_DERIVATIVE_H
9 #define ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_DERIVATIVE_H
10 /* Author : desrozis at Mon Apr 18 15:05:40 2011
11  * Generated by createNew
12  */
13 
14 /*
15  * \ingroup Law
16  * \brief Outils pour l'�valuation point � point des d�riv�es des fonctions
17  *
18  * Le derivative est une base de donn�es de propri�t�s et de valeurs des d�riv�es associ�es
19  * Son remplissage est � la charge des outils des lois lors de l'�valuation
20  *
21  * \code
22  *
23  * ScalarRealProperty In_1(0,"In_1");
24  * ScalarRealProperty In_2(1,"In_2");
25  * VectorialRealProperty In_3(2,"In_3",2);
26  *
27  * ScalarRealProperty Out_1(3,"Out_1");
28  * ScalarRealProperty Out_2(4,"Out_2");
29  * VectorialRealProperty Out_3(5,"Out_3",3);
30  *
31  * Derivative d;
32  *
33  * // Utilisation lors d'une �valuation d'une fonction (In_1,In_2,In_3) -> (Out_1,Out_2,Out_3)
34  * ...
35  *
36  * // Accession aux d�riv�es :
37  *
38  * ... d[Out_1][In_1] ...
39  * ... d[Out_1][In_2] ...
40  * ... d[Out_1][In_3][0] ...
41  * ... d[Out_1][In_3][1] ...
42  *
43  * ... d[Out_2][In_1] ...
44  * ... d[Out_2][In_2] ...
45  * ... d[Out_2][In_3][0] ...
46  * ... d[Out_2][In_3][1] ...
47  *
48  * for(Integer i = 0; i < Out_3.size(); ++i) {
49  * ... d[Out_3][i][In_1] ...
50  * ... d[Out_3][i][In_2] ...
51  * ... d[Out_3][i][In_3][0] ...
52  * ... d[Out_3][i][In_3][1] ...
53  * }
54 
55  * info() << d;
56  *
57  * \endcode
58  *
59  */
60 
61 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/DerivativeView.h"
62 
63 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
64 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
65 
66 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
67 
68 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
69 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
70 
71 namespace details {
72 
73  /*
74  * \brief Classe interne g�n�rique g�rant un type de propri�t� (Scalaire/vectorielle)
75  *
76  */
77  template<typename P>
78  class PartialDerivativeT
79  {
80  public:
81 
82  typedef DerivativeView<P> ViewType;
83 
84  typedef typename ViewType::ReferenceType ReferenceType;
85  typedef typename ViewType::ConstReferenceType ConstReferenceType;
86 
87  public:
88 
89  PartialDerivativeT(const PropertyVector& dependencies)
90  : m_dependencies(dependencies) {}
91 
92  PartialDerivativeT<P>& operator<<(const P& p)
93  {
94  m_properties << p;
95  m_views.resize(m_properties.size());
96  m_views[m_properties[p]] = ViewType(m_dependencies,p);
97  return *this;
98  }
99 
101  ReferenceType values(const Property& p)
102  {
103  ARCANE_ASSERT( (contains(p)), ("Property not registered in derivative"));
104 
105  return m_views[m_properties[p]].values();
106  }
107 
109  ViewType& operator[](const Property& p)
110  {
111  ARCANE_ASSERT( (contains(p)), ("Property not registered in derivative"));
112 
113  return m_views[m_properties[p]];
114  }
115 
117  const ViewType& operator[](const Property& p) const
118  {
119  ARCANE_ASSERT( (contains(p)), ("Property not registered in derivative"));
120 
121  return m_views[m_properties[p]];
122  }
123 
125  bool contains(const Property& p) const
126  {
127  return m_properties.contains(p);
128  }
129 
131  const PropertyVector& dependencies() const { return m_dependencies; }
132 
134  ConstArrayView<ViewType> views() const { return m_views; }
135 
136  private:
137 
138  PropertyVector m_properties;
139 
140  const PropertyVector& m_dependencies;
141 
142  SharedArray<ViewType> m_views;
143  };
144 
145 }
146 
147 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
148 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
149 
150 /*
151  * \brief Classe Derivative pour l'�valuation des d�riv�es des fonctions
152  *
153  * Le traitement des propri�t�s scalaires/vectorielles a �t� s�par� et le choix se fait statiquement
154  * par le type de propri�t�s
155  *
156  */
157 template<typename T>
158 class DerivativeT
159 {
160 private:
161 
162  typedef PropertyT<eScalar,T> ScalarProperty;
163  typedef details::PartialDerivativeT<ScalarProperty> ScalarDerivative;
164 
165  typedef PropertyT<eVectorial,T> VectorialProperty;
166  typedef details::PartialDerivativeT<VectorialProperty> VectorialDerivative;
167 
168 public:
169 
170  DerivativeT()
171  : m_scalar_derivative(m_dependencies)
172  , m_vectorial_derivative(m_dependencies) {}
173 
174  DerivativeT(const PropertyVector& dependencies)
175  : m_scalar_derivative(m_dependencies)
176  , m_vectorial_derivative(m_dependencies)
177  {
178  m_dependencies << dependencies; // Recopie
179  }
180 
181 public:
182 
184  void setFunctionDependencies(const ScalarProperty& p, const PropertyVector& properties)
185  {
186  m_scalar_derivative[p].reorder(properties);
187  }
188 
190  void setFunctionDependencies(const VectorialProperty& p, const PropertyVector& properties)
191  {
192  m_vectorial_derivative[p].reorder(properties);
193  }
194 
195  void setFunctionDependencies(PropertyVector const& dependencies)
196  {
197  m_function_dependencies = dependencies ;
198  }
199 
200  PropertyVector const& getFunctionDependencies() const
201  {
202  return m_function_dependencies ;
203  }
204 
205  bool hasFunctionDependencies() const
206  {
207  return ! m_function_dependencies.empty() ;
208  }
209 
211  DerivativeT<T>& operator<<(const ScalarProperty& p)
212  {
213  m_scalar_derivative << p;
214  return *this;
215  }
216 
218  DerivativeT<T>& operator<<(const VectorialProperty& p)
219  {
220  m_vectorial_derivative << p;
221  return *this;
222  }
223 
225  typename ScalarDerivative::ReferenceType values(const ScalarProperty& p)
226  {
227  return m_scalar_derivative.values(p);
228  }
229 
231  typename ScalarDerivative::ConstReferenceType values(const ScalarProperty& p) const
232  {
233  return m_scalar_derivative.values(p);
234  }
235 
237  typename VectorialDerivative::ReferenceType values(const VectorialProperty& p)
238  {
239  return m_vectorial_derivative.values(p);
240  }
241 
243  typename VectorialDerivative::ConstReferenceType values(const VectorialProperty& p) const
244  {
245  return m_vectorial_derivative.values(p);
246  }
247 
249  const typename ScalarDerivative::ViewType& operator[](const ScalarProperty& p) const
250  {
251  return m_scalar_derivative[p];
252  }
253 
255  const typename VectorialDerivative::ViewType& operator[](const VectorialProperty& p) const
256  {
257  return m_vectorial_derivative[p];
258  }
259 
261  // contenant l'ensemble des propri�t�s de d�pendance de la fonction)
262  PropertyVector& dependencies() { return m_dependencies; }
263 
264 private:
265 
267  PropertyVector m_dependencies;
268 
269  ScalarDerivative m_scalar_derivative;
270  VectorialDerivative m_vectorial_derivative;
271 
272  PropertyVector m_function_dependencies ;
273 
274  template<typename U> friend std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& nout, const DerivativeT<U>& d) ;
275 };
276 
277 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
278 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
279 
280 typedef DerivativeT<Real> Derivative;
281 
282 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
283 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
284 
285 // Pour le debug
286 template<typename T>
287 inline std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& nout, const DerivativeT<T>& d)
288 {
289  nout << "Derivative : ";
290 
291  bool empty = true;
292 
293  const PropertyVector& init_deps = d.m_dependencies;
294 
295  {
296  typedef typename DerivativeT<T>::ScalarDerivative ScalarDerivative;
297  const ScalarDerivative& derivative = d.m_scalar_derivative;
298  typedef typename ScalarDerivative::ViewType ViewType;
299  ConstArrayView<ViewType> views = derivative.views();
300  for(Integer k = 0; k < views.size(); ++k) {
301  const PropertyVector& deps = views[k].dependencies();
302  nout << "\nscalar['" << views[k].property().name() << "']{\n";
303  for(Integer i = 0; i < init_deps.size(); ++i) {
304  const Property& p = init_deps[i];
305  nout << " ['" << p.name() << "']={ ";
306  for(Integer j = 0; j < p.size(); ++j)
307  nout << views[k].values()[deps.offset(p)+j] << " ";
308  nout << "}\n";
309  empty = false;
310  }
311  nout << "} ";
312  }
313  }
314  {
315  typedef typename DerivativeT<T>::VectorialDerivative VectorialDerivative;
316  const VectorialDerivative& derivative = d.m_vectorial_derivative;
317  typedef typename VectorialDerivative::ViewType ViewType;
318  ConstArrayView<ViewType> views = derivative.views();
319  for(Integer k = 0; k < views.size(); ++k) {
320  nout << "\nvectorial['" << views[k].property().name() << "']{\n";
321  const PropertyVector& deps = views[k].dependencies();
322  for(Integer i = 0; i < init_deps.size(); ++i) {
323  const Property& p = init_deps[i];
324  nout << " ['" << p.name() << "']={ ";
325  for(Integer l = 0; l < views[k].values().dim1Size(); ++l) {
326  for(Integer j = 0; j < p.size(); ++j)
327  nout << views[k].values()[l][deps.offset(p)+j] << " ";
328  if(l < views[k].values().dim1Size()-1) nout << "; ";
329  }
330  nout << "}\n";
331  }
332  nout << "} ";
333  }
334  }
335 
336  if(empty) nout << "empty!";
337 
338  return nout;
339 }
340 
341 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
342 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
343 
344 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
345 
346 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
347 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
348 
349 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_DERIVATIVE_H */
